_description: YouTube Shorts technique demos for Amy's exercise library. Primary source: Renaissance Periodization (Dr. Mike Israetel). Fallback: Jeff Nippard, Squat University.
_coverage: 10/12 exercises linked. 2 missing: Single Leg RDL, Hang Snatch — no technique Shorts found from RP or Nippard.

Single Leg RDL._note: No specific single-leg RDL Short found on RP or Jeff Nippard. RP has a regular RDL Short (How to do RDLs PROPERLY) but not single-leg variant.

Hang Snatch._note: No hang snatch technique Short found on Renaissance Periodization or Jeff Nippard. RP has Olympic lifting content but as full-length videos, not Shorts.
